title: Cyclical Time
html:
Stub. Pulled out as a major theme by Yahir in his 2022 03 11 one hundred years of solitude reading log:

"Ursula said time is going in a circle, because his grandfather tried doing the same thing"

"Time isn't passing its looping in a circle"

"Time is not a concept days just happen and that's it, nothing more to it"

A throughline worth checking against any later man from the future / pre-AGI / generational notes — Yahir is drawn to time as recurrence rather than arrow.
